name: Failure to Sanitize Special Elements into a Different Plane (Special Element Injection)
description: The product does not adequately filter user-controlled input for special elements with control-plane implications, allowing attackers to inject elements that alter the intended processing of data in a downstream component.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides data containing special elements (metacharacters, control characters, delimiters) that flows to EGRESS or EXTERNAL[downstream] without a TRANSFORM node that filters or encodes the special elements into the data plane before they reach the control plane of the downstream component
